description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with clean, geometric lines and a combination of white and wood-accented exterior walls. The front facade includes a central wooden door, large rectangular windows, and a garage on one side, with landscaped greenery and a stone driveway. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, palm trees, a shaded pergola, and outdoor seating and dining areas. A rooftop terrace with a hot tub and additional greenery is visible, enhancing the outdoor living space. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and surrounded by manicured hedges, providing privacy and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with wood and white exterior, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool, pergola, and rooftop terrace. The design highlights open spaces and strong indoor-outdoor integration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, and landscaped entryway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rooftop terrace with hot tub and the backyard pool area with pergola and seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, swimming pool, outdoor dining, and shaded lounge area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the landscaped garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
